title: Indoor Gas Log Sets | Heat & Glo
description: Add warmth, comfort and ambiance with our lineup of gas, electric and wood fireplaces, inserts and log sets.

h2: Designed for easy installation and use, these indoor gas log set collections bring instant warmth and ambiance to your existing fireplace. Explore a variety of styles and finishes to complement the interior design of your home.

paragraphs: Designed for easy installation and use, these indoor gas log set collections bring instant warmth and ambiance to your existing fireplace. Explore a variety of styles and finishes to complement the interior design of your home.

The convenience of gas meets the experience of an open-hearth fireplace. Four hand-painted ceramic fiber logs fit inside your existing firebox and are equally beautiful with or without a burning fire. Simply use the included switch or remote for immediate, radiant heat that’s reminiscent of a real fire. Enjoy a bold, dynamic fire without the mess or hassle of wood.

Get all the ambiance of a mature, rustic fire with the convenience of gas logs. The Smoldering Timberland Oak vented gas log set includes hand-painted logs and a tube burner system designed to fit your existing firebox. Flames and true-to-life embers are ignited via match strike or control flame height with the touch of a button. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and single or double-tube burner.

Enjoy the beauty of a traditional, open hearth– without the hassle. The Timberland Oak vented gas log set includes hand-painted oak logs and a tube burner system designed to fit your existing firebox. Flames and true-to-life embers are ignited via match strike or control flame height with the touch of a button. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and single or double-tube burner.

Convert your see-through fireplace to the ease of a gas log set. It looks great from either side and is attractive even when not burning. Switch on bold flames through charred logs and glowing embers for true enjoyment.

Enjoy the beauty of an open-hearth fire, without the hassle. The Grand Birch vented gas log set includes hand-painted oak logs and a tiered burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers on multiple levels, all controlled with easy on/off capabilities thanks to electronic ignition. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

The convenience of gas meets the experience of an open-hearth fireplace. Eight hand-painted, ceramic fiber logs are designed to be ultra-realistic – beautiful with or without a burning fire. Simply use the included switch or remote for immediate, radiant heat that’s reminiscent of a real fire. Enjoy a bold, dynamic fire without the mess or hassle of wood. Logs available in 24 or 30-inch widths.

Your fireplace gets a touch of finesse with the Contemporary Gas Logs Series. The slim burner is designed for existing fireboxes so you can easily upgrade your wood-burning fire to a more efficient, contemporary solution. A combination of reflective glass and your choice of gas logs, lava rock or cannon ball set provides a modern backdrop for the liveliness of warm, glowing flames.

Enjoy the beauty of an open-hearth fire, without the hassle. The Heritage Oak vented gas log set includes hand-painted oak logs and a tiered burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers on multiple levels, all controlled with easy on/off capabilities thanks to electronic ignition. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

Enjoy the beauty of a birch wood fire with gas logs that make your fireplace hassle-free. The Woodland Birch vented gas log set includes hand-painted logs and a tube burner system designed to fit your existing firebox. Flames and true-to-life embers are ignited via match strike or control flame height with the touch of a button. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and single or double-tube burner.

The Duzy 3 brings the convenience of gas to an existing open-hearth fireplace. Six hand-painted refractory logs are incredibly realistic – beautiful with or without a burning fire. Simply use the included switch or remote for immediate, radiant heat that’s reminiscent of a real fire. Enjoy a bold, dynamic fire without the mess or hassle of wood.

Conveniently update your wood-burning fireplace with the Grand Oak vented gas log set. Replace the hassle of an open wood fire for hand-painted oak logs and a tiered burner system that displays large flames and glowing embers on multiple levels. Enjoy the ambiance and heat of a traditional fire, with easy on/off capabilities thanks to electronic ignition. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and two or three-tiered burners.

A kindled stack of hand-painted logs makes it easier than ever to enjoy an open-hearth fire. This gas log set includes hand-painted logs and a tube burner system designed to fit your existing firebox. Flames and true-to-life embers are ignited via match strike or control flame height with the touch of a button. Log sets available in 18, 24 and 30-inch widths and single or double-tube burner.
Whether you're updating your current fireplace or adding one to your home, our authorized dealers can show you a range of options that fit your style and budget.

Please refer to the owner’s/installation manual for complete requirements, specifications, testing and listing information. The heat output as well as the appearance of your unit in your specific application—including the flame, embers and overall product appearance—may vary for a variety of reasons from the data and images presented. Product specifications and pricing are subject to change without notice, and installation must adhere strictly to instructions shipped with product. Hearth & Home Technologies reserves the right to update units periodically. If you need help in determining the product that best suits your needs, please see your local authorized dealer.
